series_metadata.series_title: Rules Infraction Board Mental Health Assessment Log
series_metadata.series_description: Log that identifies offenders who have received a conduct report, the staff assigned, and the outcome.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three years past date of Rules Infraction Board hearing, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain three years past date of Rules Infraction Board hearing, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
